aries.horoscope_text: A female friend you haven't seen for a while could surprise you with a call. A lot of interesting news and useful information could be exchanged that benefits both of you. You may make a number of short journeys throughout the day, Aries, as you have a lot that needs doing. A small increase in income could also be in the works. In the evening, rent a romantic video.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — lots of little tasks today, none of them the one that matters.
aries.prophecy: The stars say expect a surprise call with useful news. It's a recruiter. It's always a recruiter. 📞

taurus.horoscope_text: With the current aspects at play, Taurus, you could find that the hard work you've done in the past finally brings financial rewards. This will make you very happy, but don't get carried away and go on a spending spree! Treat yourself a little. Celebrate with a friend, if possible. Take care to exercise a little good sense.
taurus.deploy_today: Yes — past work finally pays off. Don't blow the bonus on a mechanical keyboard.
taurus.prophecy: The stars say your hard work finally pays off. It's a Jira badge that says 'Closed 50 tickets.' No raise. 🏅

gemini.horoscope_text: Today, Gemini, you might find yourself thinking longingly of exotic lands and possibly traveling to them in the future. Romantic daydreams could interfere with daily tasks, so stay focused, while exploring travel content like books and videos to feed your wanderlust during this introspective period.
gemini.deploy_today: No — you're mentally on a beach in Bali. Don't deploy from Bali-brain.
gemini.prophecy: The stars say you'll daydream of exotic lands today. Reality: 6 tabs of flights you won't book and 0 tickets closed. ✈️

cancer.horoscope_text: A small sum of money could come your way today, Cancer. It could be that someone pays you what's owed you, or you could win a small amount in a lottery. You might find a $20 bill lying in the street! Sex and romance are very much on your mind. If you can't get together with a partner this evening, you might curl up with a steamy novel or watch a romantic video.
cancer.deploy_today: Maybe — found $20 on the street energy, could also be an untracked cloud credit refund.
cancer.prophecy: The stars say a small windfall is coming. It's a $4 Venmo repayment from three years ago. 💵

leo.horoscope_text: Your romantic side is flying high today, Leo. The opposite sex in general and your own partner in particular are going to seem especially attractive to you. You could also see in an entirely different light someone you think of as a friend. An increasingly busy social life in the future is possible, so expect to hear rumblings about parties or other social events.
leo.deploy_today: Maybe — social calendar's packed. Standup's about to feel like a party.
leo.prophecy: The stars say your social life is heating up. It's three back-to-back 'quick syncs' with no agenda. 🎉

virgo.horoscope_text: New people you meet today are likely to be favorably impressed by your manners, social skills, and, above all, excellent sense of humor. Don't be surprised if all of this brings you some new opportunities today! Your health is radiant, and you are probably looking great. This is an excellent time to plan an evening out with friends or a romantic partner if possible.
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — you're charming everyone today. Charm the reviewer into an approve too.
virgo.prophecy: The stars say new opportunities arrive today. It's a 'quick favor' from another team with no ticket and no deadline. Just kidding, the deadline is EOD. 😏

libra.horoscope_text: Romantic feelings blossom today, Libra. You may suddenly appear more attractive than usual. Lovers and potential lovers may seem unusually attentive. You could also be feeling very creative, and you might want to try your hand at poetry or fiction. Reading romantic novels or seeing romantic movies could also be appealing. Surround yourself with candles, flowers, and music, and enjoy!
libra.deploy_today: No — you're in creative-writing mode, not code-review mode.
libra.prophecy: The stars say try your hand at poetry today. Your commit messages already qualify. 📝

scorpio.horoscope_text: You could wake up this morning, look around, and decide you want to spend as much time as possible working on your home, Scorpio. You could be bored with the decor and want to make some changes. Spend the day coming up with ideas and then tonight try to analyze the situation and see what's feasible now. Most likely you'll be able to do some but not all of what you want.
scorpio.deploy_today: Maybe — redecorating urge equals refactoring urge. Scope it before you gut the whole codebase.
scorpio.prophecy: The stars say you'll want to redecorate today. Translation: you'll want to rewrite the whole app in a new framework. You will not finish. 🛠️

sagittarius.horoscope_text: Today, Sagittarius, you could receive an affectionate, supportive letter or phone call from someone close to you. Communications with others should go smoothly, and intelligent conversations could well take place. A favorite author, musician, or actor could release a new book, album, or movie that you'll want to jump on right away. Or you might want to try your hand at such enterprises yourself. You do have the talent.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Maybe — communication flows smoothly today, even your Slack messages land without a follow-up 'wait what do you mean.'
sagittarius.prophecy: The stars say a favorite artist drops something new today. It's actually just a changelog nobody reads. 🎵

capricorn.horoscope_text: Your financial affairs could look especially rosy now, Capricorn. Some benefits are definitely coming your way, although everything isn't quite as promising as it seems. You could well find yourself with less than you were hoping for. Think of whatever gain may be coming as something extra, but don't count on it.
capricorn.deploy_today: Maybe — good news might be smaller than it sounds. Sound familiar, sprint estimate?
capricorn.prophecy: The stars say financial gains are coming, but less than hoped. Same as every 'quick win' sprint ticket ever. 💸

aquarius.horoscope_text: You should be happier than usual with what you see in the mirror, Aquarius, because your inner beauty is more visible than usual. You could also feel especially sociable. Both old friends and new should find your company especially congenial. Romance blossoms, although there's a slight tendency today to see partners through rose-colored glasses. Hang onto your common sense, but not too tightly.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — confidence is high today, so is the risk of shipping without reading the diff twice.
aquarius.prophecy: The stars say you're seeing everything through rose-colored glasses today. Including your own code review. Get a second opinion. 👓

pisces.horoscope_text: Today you might find yourself more inclined than usual to actively explore your interests in the arts, Pisces. You might want to look at an online art gallery or attend a concert or play. Your interest could be in the motivations of the artists as much as the works themselves. Don't be surprised if you're especially drawn to the more tormented great artists like Beethoven or Van Gogh.
pisces.deploy_today: No — you're in your tortured-artist era, not your tortured-on-call era. Stay off prod.
pisces.prophecy: The stars say you'll explore tormented artists today. Relatable — you too stare at a blank canvas called TODO.md. 🎨
